title: Alaikaa Laikka Lyrics Thuppakki Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Alaikaa laikka
Singers: Javed Ali, Sayanora Phillip,

Lyrics: Pa Vijay
Music: Harrish Jeyaraj
Movie: Thuppakki

Alaikaa laikka apple-in make-ah
kannangal rendum strawberry cake-ah (2)

Sana sana oh saaraa
nee swasam konda moona
kanaa kanaa nee thaana
kandaadum kangal thaana

Flim kaatiye film kaatiye feelings yethaadhey
Anal mootiye kanal kootiye suttu posukkaadhey

Maaney maaney, honey moonum enga maaney
Jaaney jaaney, adhu kaatupakkam thaaney
thaeney thaeney, hey thithippaana thaeney
Queen-ey Queen-ey, ini muttrum visilthaaney ..

En nettril pottil mutham kolla
uyirai vaikindraaney
Naan pichi pichi pesum tamilai
kavidhai enkindraaney

Nee minor illai major endru
sollum undhan nenjam
Nee major anaal naanum kooda
minor aaven konjam

Ini avanethaan avanethaan enakkaana oruvan
mun irundhaalum mugam kaati sirikaadha kalvan

Ye kaatrukena kastam
panipoovukkum thaan istam
Idhil thaenukillai nastam
sera vaa vaa nee

Alaikaa laikka apple-in make-ah
kannangal rendum strawberry cake-ah

Sana sana oh saanaa
naan swasam konda moonaa
kanaa kanaa nee thaana
kandaadum kangal thaana

Flim kaatiye film kaatiye feelings yeraadho
anal mootiye kanal kootiye suttu posukkaadho

Nee thottu pesum heart-u kullae
minus degree veppam
Nee oxygen-il swasithaale
vaasam serkum nutpam

En pakkam vandhu nirkindradhu
vinnai thodum veeram
Avan perin munnaal en peyar
sera illai romba thooram

Nee inipaana kuraipaana
agarvaalu alva
Nee ivanpaarka idam ketka
idhal sethu kolvaal

En methai avanthaaney
avan nenjil otipeney
ini konji kolluvaaney
mutha thaen naan serpen
Alaikaa laikka ...  la la laikka

Alaikaa laikka apple-in make-ah
kannangal rendum strawberry cake-ah

Sana sana oh saanaa
naan swasam konda moona
kanaa kanaa nee thaana
kandaadum kangal naana

Flim kaatiye film kaatiye feelings yethaadhey
anal mootiye kanal kootiye suttu posukkaadhey

Maaney maaney, honey moonum enga maaney
Jaaney jaaney, adhu kaatupakkam thaaney
thaeney thaeney, hey thithippaana thaeney

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the movie associated with the song Alaikaa Laikka?

The song is from the Tamil movie Thuppakki, released in 2012.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Thuppakki?

The lead roles are played by Vijay and Kajal Aggarwal.

Who composed the music for the song Alaikaa Laikka?

The music was composed by the talented Harris Jayaraj.

What is the mood of the song Alaikaa Laikka?

The song has an energetic and romantic mood.

Who penned the lyrics for the song Alaikaa Laikka?

The lyrics were written by Pa Vijay.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Alaikaa Laikka' from the 2012 Tamil movie 'Thuppakki' is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases the chemistry between the lead characters, portrayed by Vijay and Kajal Aggarwal. Sung by Javed Ali and Sayanora Phillip, with music composed by Harris Jayaraj and lyrics by Pa Vijay, the song captures the essence of youthful romance and celebration. Its upbeat rhythm and catchy lyrics make it a favorite for festive occasions and dance floors. The song's lively visuals and dynamic choreography further enhance its appeal, leaving a lasting impression on the audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Alaikaa Laikka, a vibrant and energetic song from the blockbuster movie Thuppakki, features the captivating vocals of Javed Ali and Sayanora Phillip. Composed by the renowned Harris Jayaraj and penned by the talented Pa Vijay, this track exudes a lively and romantic vibe. Experience the magic of this musical masterpiece that perfectly complements the dynamic performances of Vijay and Kajal Aggarwal.
stanzaMeanings: Alaikaa laikka
Lyrics by Pa Vijay, Music by Harrish Jeyaraj, from the movie Thuppakki
Alaikaa laikka, like an apple, our eyes are like a strawberry cake (2)
Slowly, oh dear, you breathe in, you are the one who sees three dreams with your eyes
Showing a film, showing a film, feelings are not there, but don't let the fire go out
Oh my dear, honey moon, our dear, that is the place of the wind, oh honey, oh honey, hey, sweet honey, Queen, Queen, now it will shine more..
In my heart, the kiss is taking life away, I am speaking crazily, my Tamil poetry is coming out
You are not a minor, your heart says you are a major, but I am also a minor, just a little
Now he is the one, he is the one, even if someone else is there, he won't smile at me
Oh, the wind is troublesome, the flower likes it, there is no loss in this, come, come, you
Alaikaa laikka, like an apple, our eyes are like a strawberry cake
Slowly, oh dear, I breathe in, you are the one who sees three dreams with your eyes
Showing a film, showing a film, feelings are not there, but don't let the fire go out
When you touch, the heart inside is at a minus degree, the heat will mix with the oxygen in the breath
Coming near me is bravery that touches the sky, before him, my name is not mentioned much
You are now a little bit of a problem, if he sees, he will ask where this is going
My sweet, he is the one, he will hold me tightly now, I will mix with the sweet honey
Alaikaa laikka ... la la laikka
Alaikaa laikka, like an apple, our eyes are like a strawberry cake
Slowly, oh dear, I breathe in, you are the one who sees three dreams with your eyes
Showing a film, showing a film, feelings are not there, but don't let the fire go out
Oh my dear, honey moon, our dear, that is the place of the wind, oh honey, oh honey, hey, sweet honey, Queen, Queen, now it will shine more..
